triggerTimingNote: These 12 trigger points come from the annotated twelve-trigger score. Trigger Point 2 is locked to 00:11.912 in the stereo-sum electronics export. Trigger Point 1 starts at 00:02.000 in the file. All later derived clips start at their beat-mapped onsets and end 2 beats after the next trigger point.

events.timingNote: Trigger Point 2 anchored to 00:11.912 in the stereo-sum export; all other clip boundaries are derived from the score beat map.

lighting.summary: Darkness loosens from stage left and crosses the ensemble as a first glint.

soprano_l1.label: Sop-L1
soprano_l1.summary: Leads the first glint at the far-left edge.

soprano_l2.label: Sop-L2
soprano_l2.summary: Answers just right of the opening spark.

tenor_l.label: Ten-L
tenor_l.summary: A low central ember wakes after the sopranos.

bass_l.label: Bass-L
bass_l.summary: Bass shadow arrives late and remains restrained.

alto_l2.label: Alto-L2
alto_l2.summary: A small right-side shimmer catches only at the end of the breath.

alto_l1.label: Alto-L1
alto_l1.summary: The far-right edge barely lights before the piece tips into Trigger 2.

events.timingNote: Trigger Point 2 anchored to 00:11.912 in the stereo-sum export; all other clip boundaries are derived from the score beat map.

lighting.summary: A strong forte shimmer courses left-to-right, then measures 11–19 fracture into hard max-brightness glitter before the rebound.

soprano_l1.label: Sop-L1
soprano_l1.summary: Opens the first bright sweep, then breaks into left-biased hard glitter before reigniting.

soprano_l2.label: Sop-L2
soprano_l2.summary: Tracks the first sweep, then interlocks with Sop-L1 in upper-left hard glitter.

tenor_l.label: Ten-L
tenor_l.summary: The center-left staff becomes a restless engine of full-power irregular flashes.

bass_l.label: Bass-L
bass_l.summary: Bass anchors the glitter with the deepest max-brightness cuts.

alto_l2.label: Alto-L2
alto_l2.summary: Receives the first sweep, then snaps into right-side hard glitter replies.

alto_l1.label: Alto-L1
alto_l1.summary: The far-right edge receives the bright wave last, then throws back the brightest hard sparks before the return sweep.

events.timingNote: Trigger Point 2 anchored to 00:11.912 in the stereo-sum export; all other clip boundaries are derived from the score beat map.

lighting.summary: The forte glare breaks into a soft right-to-left drift with long dim tails.

soprano_l1.label: Sop-L1
soprano_l1.summary: Receives the last portion of the retreat and fades almost immediately.

soprano_l2.label: Sop-L2
soprano_l2.summary: Lights briefly after the altos, then falls back into dark.

tenor_l.label: Ten-L
tenor_l.summary: Carries the center of the decrescendo for the longest span.

bass_l.label: Bass-L
bass_l.summary: A grounded low glow lingers beneath the receding wave.

alto_l2.label: Alto-L2
alto_l2.summary: Starts the retreat with a soft but clear right-side lead.

alto_l1.label: Alto-L1
alto_l1.summary: The far-right edge speaks first, then withdraws the fastest.

events.timingNote: Trigger Point 2 anchored to 00:11.912 in the stereo-sum export; all other clip boundaries are derived from the score beat map.

lighting.summary: A compact, compressed pulse ignites from the middle and flicks outward.

soprano_l1.label: Sop-L1
soprano_l1.summary: Catches the outermost left splash at the end of the pulse.

soprano_l2.label: Sop-L2
soprano_l2.summary: Follows the central ignition with a short upper-left flicker.

tenor_l.label: Ten-L
tenor_l.summary: Starts the pulse from the left side of the center pair.

bass_l.label: Bass-L
bass_l.summary: Completes the center ignition with a warm bass flash.

alto_l2.label: Alto-L2
alto_l2.summary: Receives the pulse on the right side a beat later.

alto_l1.label: Alto-L1
alto_l1.summary: The far-right edge blinks last, then drops instantly away.

events.timingNote: Trigger Point 2 anchored to 00:11.912 in the stereo-sum export; all other clip boundaries are derived from the score beat map.

lighting.summary: A moderate breath opens from the center and widens slowly toward both edges.

soprano_l1.label: Sop-L1
soprano_l1.summary: Far-left soprano blooms only after the central pair has opened.

soprano_l2.label: Sop-L2
soprano_l2.summary: Upper-left line broadens into a rounded secondary crest.

tenor_l.label: Ten-L
tenor_l.summary: Tenor light initiates the breath with a steady middle glow.

bass_l.label: Bass-L
bass_l.summary: Bass stays warm and weighted beneath the widening gesture.

alto_l2.label: Alto-L2
alto_l2.summary: Right-middle altos open late and shine a little cleaner than the left edge.

alto_l1.label: Alto-L1
alto_l1.summary: The far-right edge closes the breath with the latest bloom.

events.timingNote: Trigger Point 2 anchored to 00:11.912 in the stereo-sum export; all other clip boundaries are derived from the score beat map.

lighting.summary: Suspended three-beat rocking shifts weight between the center and the stage edges.

soprano_l1.label: Sop-L1
soprano_l1.summary: Joins only on the leftward swing, then recedes.

soprano_l2.label: Sop-L2
soprano_l2.summary: Carries the upper-left lilt across both swings.

tenor_l.label: Ten-L
tenor_l.summary: Tenor drives the first swing and keeps the pulse coherent.

bass_l.label: Bass-L
bass_l.summary: Bass gives the rocking motion its weight and deepest glow.

alto_l2.label: Alto-L2
alto_l2.summary: Receives the rightward swing with a measured, late crest.

alto_l1.label: Alto-L1
alto_l1.summary: The far-right edge lights only when the pendulum swings fully across.

events.timingNote: Trigger Point 2 anchored to 00:11.912 in the stereo-sum export; all other clip boundaries are derived from the score beat map.

lighting.summary: A long exhale lets the glow travel right-to-left while steadily thinning toward piano.

soprano_l1.label: Sop-L1
soprano_l1.summary: Receives the final trace of the exhale as it disappears into stage left.

soprano_l2.label: Sop-L2
soprano_l2.summary: Softens earlier than Trigger 5 and never quite returns to its former width.

tenor_l.label: Ten-L
tenor_l.summary: Holds the center of the diminuendo before letting it go.

bass_l.label: Bass-L
bass_l.summary: Keeps a low ember alive longest, but only barely.

alto_l2.label: Alto-L2
alto_l2.summary: Begins the exhale with the clearest right-side release.

alto_l1.label: Alto-L1
alto_l1.summary: Starts brightest, then dims fastest as the energy drains away.

events.timingNote: Trigger Point 2 anchored to 00:11.912 in the stereo-sum export; all other clip boundaries are derived from the score beat map.

lighting.summary: Separated search-beam gestures alternate between outer edges and the middle pair.

soprano_l1.label: Sop-L1
soprano_l1.summary: Outer-left searches first and returns in the final glance.

soprano_l2.label: Sop-L2
soprano_l2.summary: Bridges the outer-left call back toward the center.

tenor_l.label: Ten-L
tenor_l.summary: Takes the clearest middle search pass of the trigger.

bass_l.label: Bass-L
bass_l.summary: A low center glow answers the search pattern with extra weight.

alto_l2.label: Alto-L2
alto_l2.summary: Right-middle staff takes over late and arcs outward.

alto_l1.label: Alto-L1
alto_l1.summary: The far-right edge answers the far-left opening with its own brief search beam.

events.timingNote: Trigger Point 2 anchored to 00:11.912 in the stereo-sum export; all other clip boundaries are derived from the score beat map.

lighting.summary: Quiet suspended lanterns appear in separate pockets rather than as a shared wave.

soprano_l1.label: Sop-L1
soprano_l1.summary: Barely-there high-left glow, almost a memory.

soprano_l2.label: Sop-L2
soprano_l2.summary: A short reply above the left-middle, then silence.

tenor_l.label: Ten-L
tenor_l.summary: The most stable pool of light sits in the tenor staff.

bass_l.label: Bass-L
bass_l.summary: Bass glows later and lower, without ever matching tenor brightness.

alto_l2.label: Alto-L2
alto_l2.summary: Right-middle light surfaces only briefly, like a distant response.

alto_l1.label: Alto-L1
alto_l1.summary: The far-right edge appears last and disappears first.

events.timingNote: Trigger Point 2 anchored to 00:11.912 in the stereo-sum export; all other clip boundaries are derived from the score beat map.

lighting.summary: A binary max-brightness glitter field grows denser across the ensemble from measure 98 to 104, culminating just before Trigger 11.

soprano_l1.label: Sop-L1
soprano_l1.summary: Far-left sparks start relatively sparse and then accelerate toward the climax.

soprano_l2.label: Sop-L2
soprano_l2.summary: Upper-left glitter fills in after Sop-L1 and stays active through the build.

tenor_l.label: Ten-L
tenor_l.summary: Tenor becomes the main engine of the binary density crescendo.

bass_l.label: Bass-L
bass_l.summary: Bass throws the heaviest max-brightness cuts near the crest of the build.

alto_l2.label: Alto-L2
alto_l2.summary: Right-middle glitter catches late and helps complete the binary surge.

alto_l1.label: Alto-L1
alto_l1.summary: The far-right edge peaks last, with only hard on/off flashes driving the climax.

events.timingNote: Trigger Point 2 anchored to 00:11.912 in the stereo-sum export; all other clip boundaries are derived from the score beat map.

lighting.summary: The only fully unified gesture in the piece: all six staffs begin together in a slow glow ramp up and down, then split into staggered afterglow currents.

soprano_l1.label: Sop-L1
soprano_l1.summary: Shares the full-ensemble slow glow, then releases first into a soft left-edge shimmer.

soprano_l2.label: Sop-L2
soprano_l2.summary: After the shared glow, soprano L2 keeps a hovering upper-left remnant.

tenor_l.label: Ten-L
tenor_l.summary: Tenor holds the center after the unified crest, acting as the pivot of the split.

bass_l.label: Bass-L
bass_l.summary: Bass sustains the richest central afterglow once the unison has broken apart.

alto_l2.label: Alto-L2
alto_l2.summary: After the shared ramp, alto L2 takes a delayed rightward shimmer.

alto_l1.label: Alto-L1
alto_l1.summary: The far-right edge breaks away last, completing the afterglow split.

events.timingNote: Trigger Point 2 anchored to 00:11.912 in the stereo-sum export; all other clip boundaries are derived from the score beat map.

lighting.summary: From measure 115 onward, every light entrance is locked to actual light-chorus note onsets, dissolving only through score-synchronous rhythmic residue.

soprano_l1.label: Sop-L1
soprano_l1.summary: Every flash is locked to Sop-L1 note onsets, leaving a fragile upper-left residue.

soprano_l2.label: Sop-L2
soprano_l2.summary: Sop-L2 answers strictly on its own entrances, never drifting off the score rhythm.

tenor_l.label: Ten-L
tenor_l.summary: Tenor keeps the strongest note-synchronous core through the final section.

bass_l.label: Bass-L
bass_l.summary: Bass traces each onset with the deepest synchronized low flash.

alto_l2.label: Alto-L2
alto_l2.summary: Alto-L2 articulates the ending as a right-middle rhythmic echo.

alto_l1.label: Alto-L1
alto_l1.summary: Alto-L1 remains the faintest note-synchronous edge of the final fade.

lightingDesignNote: Twelve trigger-point torch choreography authored for the six-staff light chorus. Trigger Point 11 begins with the piece's only fully unified slow glow ramp before splitting apart again.
